task: In session metadata, created_at is when the session was ended and the metadata created so in src/checkpoints/transcript.ts and src/checkpoints/orchestration.ts, the createdAt and lastActivityAt should reflect this. The first item in the jsonl is when the session is created/started
user_feedback_text: In session metadata, created_at is when the session was ended and the metadata created so in src/checkpoints/transcript.ts and src/checkpoints/orchestration.ts, the createdAt and lastActivityAt should reflect this. The first item in the jsonl is when the session is created/started
